widget.title: Video compressor
dropzone.label: Drop a video here or browse files
dropzone.hint: MP4, MOV, WebM, MKV or AVI — stays on your device
controls.alreadyUnder: Heads up: this file is already under {mb} MB. Compressing it further won't help much — try a smaller target or quality mode.
status.engine.webcodecs: Engine: fast mode — using your device
status.engine.ffmpeg: Engine: compatibility mode — slower, but works everywhere
progress.label: Compressing
result.heading: Done — your video is ready
result.compare.hint: Drag the slider to compare. Left: original, right: compressed.
error.heading: Something went wrong
error.notVideo: That file doesn't look like a video we can read. Try an MP4, MOV, WebM, MKV or AVI file.
error.targetTooSmall: That target is too small for a video this long — the result would be unwatchable. Try a larger target size.
error.fileTooLargeForFallback: This file needs the compatibility engine (because of its format or this browser), which can't process files over 1.5 GB. Convert it to MP4 first, or use Chrome or Edge for large MP4, MOV, WebM and MKV files.
error.noEngine: Your browser can't run the compressor. Please update to a current version of Chrome, Firefox, Safari or Edge.
error.decode: This video couldn't be opened. The file may be damaged or in a format this tool can't read.
error.encode: Encoding failed unexpectedly. Try reloading the page, or a different browser.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Try reloading the page.
dropzone.label.audio: Drop a file here or browse files
dropzone.hint.audio: MP4, MOV, M4A, WAV, MKV — stays on your device
